query:
UPDATE person_contacts SET kind = ($2::text)::contact_kind, label = $3, value = $4,
                                          visibility = ($5::text)::contact_visibility
                WHERE id = $1
                RETURNING id, person_id,
                          kind::text AS "kind!",
                          label,
                          value AS "value!: serde_json::Value",
                          visibility::text AS "vis!"
